headlines.summary: Oil markets traded in an unusual pattern in Tuesday’s early morning session, with Brent crude prices rising while WTI crude fell, a shift from their usual lockstep movements. headlines.title: Santos Doubles Down on Oil and LNG Expansion
headlines.summary: Australia’s Santos plans to prioritize growth in the production of crude oil and natural gas both at home and abroad, including in Alaska, the company said today, as quoted by Reuters.
